channel.title: Logbook — Notes from the bar
channel.description: Strength training writing by Coach V.

item.title: Coaches I wouldn't refer my own clients to
item.description: Three quiet red flags I look for when a lifter asks me about their strength coach. Not the cartoon villains. The ones serious lifters actually meet.

item.title: RPE without the calibration is just a guess
item.description: RPE only works when the lifter has calibrated it against their own bar. Without that, the number on the spreadsheet is a feeling pretending to be data.
